category_sources: source_facts.description says haskell-stack develops Haskell projects; official docs describe Stack as a Haskell build tool.
display_name_sources: Official Stack documentation uses Stack as the display name; source_facts.name identifies the Homebrew formula as haskell-stack.
docs_sources: Official Stack documentation is hosted at docs.haskellstack.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/commercialhaskell/stack; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe Stack as a cross-platform Haskell project development/build tool using GHC, Cabal, Hackage, and Stackage.
